::: {.portfolio-hero}
## Portfolio
A single hub for my climate-ocean research, publication record, and AI-focused products.
:::

::: {.portfolio-metrics}
::: {.portfolio-metric}
**Research Programs**  
From Kuroshio teleconnections to sea-level process diagnostics.
:::

::: {.portfolio-metric}
**Publications**  
Peer-reviewed papers, reports, books, and conference proceedings.
:::

::: {.portfolio-metric}
**AI Solutions**  
Interactive tools for ocean-climate data exploration.
:::
:::

<details class="portfolio-section" open>
<summary><strong>Research</strong></summary>

{{< include experience.qmd >}}

</details>

<details class="portfolio-section">
<summary><strong>Publications</strong></summary>

{{< include pubs.qmd >}}

</details>

<details class="portfolio-section">
<summary><strong>AI Solutions</strong></summary>

{{< include ai-solutions.qmd >}}

</details>
